Madhya Pradesh Polytechnic Entrance Exam.official_note: Official DTE MP MPOnline portal. MP PPT entrance discontinued from 2025; polytechnic admission now via Class-10 merit + online counselling, with seat-allotment/merit lists published on this portal (dte.mponline.gov.in). Fetcher could not load (gov ASP.NET portal) but domain confirmed official via search.

Madhya Pradesh Pre Agriculture Test.official_note: Official MP Employees Selection Board (MPESB/ESB) PAT result/merit page on esb.mp.gov.in. Final merit/result published here; downstream counselling/cutoffs via RVSKVV/JNKVV through MPOnline. Page TLS-errored in fetcher (cert chain) but is the correct official ESB result URL surfaced in search.

Madhya Pradesh Pre Polytechnic Test.official_note: Official DTE MP MPOnline portal where MP PPT/polytechnic seat allotment and merit lists are published. Entrance test discontinued from 2025 (admission via Class-10 merit + counselling on this portal). Could not fetch (gov portal) but domain confirmed official.

Maharashtra Common Entrance Test.official_note: Official Maharashtra State CET Cell site (MHT-CET). CAP cutoffs (opening/closing ranks per institute/course) are published here each round; CAP registration on the year's FE portal (e.g. fe2026.mahacet.org). Homepage returned HTTP 403 to fetcher (bot-block) but confirmed official/correct via search.

Manipal Academy of Higher Education Desi.official_note: Official MAHE online counselling portal (counseling.manipal.edu) where program-wise closing ranks / seat allotment for MAHE entrance programs are published. Design admission merit prepared by MAHE; cutoffs/allotment surfaced here and on manipal.edu. Portal page loaded and confirmed as the official MAHE counselling entry point.

Manipal Entrance Test.official_note: Official MAHE online counselling portal where MET branch/campus-wise closing ranks and seat-allotment results are released (Round 1/2 cutoffs published here; also mirrored on manipal.edu). Portal fetched and confirmed official.

Military Nursing Service Entrance Examin.official_note: Official Join Indian Army portal (joinindianarmy.nic.in). MNS B.Sc Nursing shortlist/merit lists are uploaded here; final merit prepared by DGMS from NEET-UG + ToGIGE/interview/medical. Replaced the prior Authentication.aspx login link with the official portal homepage; site loaded and confirmed official (notifications/results section).
